result.login_type: account required (redirects to claude.ai/new when logged in)
result.communication_type: HTTP fetch + Intercom WebSocket (support chat only)

observations.analytics: DataDog RUM (browser-intake-us5-datadoghq.com), Segment, Facebook Pixel, Intercom
observations.websocket_is_intercom: YES - wss://nexus-websocket-a.intercom.io is Intercom support widget, NOT Claude AI streaming

notes: Claude accessible with login. API goes through a-api.anthropic.com. WebSocket is Intercom support (not AI API). Chat completion uses SSE streaming via HTTP. ~87 requests on page load.
